title: rosa villosa subsp. mollis
intro: Rosa villosa subsp. mollis, also known as the velvety rose or moss rose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the rose family, characterized by its soft, velvety leaves and stems. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Rosa villosa subsp. mollis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for medicinal purposes.
